title: Input default value handling is not consistent

features.name: input port with default value
features.description: Code should include an input port declaration with a default value assignment using the = operator

features.name: unconnected instantiation with default input
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an input port with a default value is not connected (left unbound)

features.name: formal assertion with cover on unbound input
features.description: Code should include an SVA cover statement checking the value of a signal driven by an unconnected input with default value

features.name: formal assertion with assert on unbound input
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert statement checking the value of a signal driven by an unconnected input with default value
